subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: This school holdeth great import in the world of existence, for nothing is more exalted than knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مدرسه خیلی اهمیت دارد در عالم وجود اعظم از دانائی چیزی نیست
subcodes.subjects: @educational curricula, @high station of learning, @universal education, @education of children; moral education, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @man's distinction from the animal, @knowledge; recognition of God
